# Blueprint: fixture-blueprint

Created: 2026-05-26  |  Status: planning  |  Repo: test-org/test-repo

## Goal
A test blueprint using the new naming convention.

## Acceptance criteria (EARS-style -- each must be independently testable)

- [ ] The system shall use blueprint naming -- VOI: decided-by-data
- [x] When invoked, the system shall create a .blueprint.md file -- VOI: decided-by-data
